nasb.text: ‘Thus says the Lord God, “Because Edom has acted against the house of Judah by taking vengeance, and has incurred grievous guilt, and avenged themselves upon them,”

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord God: Because Edom acted revengefully against the house of Judah and has grievously offended in taking vengeance on them,

cnv.text: 主耶和華這樣說：“因為以東向猶大家報仇雪恨。他們這樣作，就犯了大罪。

ccb.text: “耶和华说，‘因为以东报复犹大，犯了大罪。
